query: Find 10 parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen municipality, sorted by parcel area descending.

1.description: resolve kommunenummer for Drammen using kommuner.kommune

2.description: select parcels (teig) in the municipality with area > 5000 m2, compute area, sort desc, limit 10

replan_events.detail: Step 1 is planned to query database 'kommuner', but was attempted against 'matrikkeleneiendomskartteig'. Produce a new plan or keep this step on the planned database.
Step 3 is not part of the finalized plan. Produce a new numbered plan before continuing.

executions.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal AS area_m2, ST_Area(omrade::geometry) AS computed_area_m2, COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) AS area_used, kommunenummer
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) > 5000
ORDER BY COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) DESC
LIMIT 10;

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal AS area_m2, ST_Area(omrade::geometry) AS computed_area_m2, COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) AS area_used, kommunenummer
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) > 5000
ORDER BY COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) DESC
LIMIT 10;
